name: Kahlua-Colada Parfaits
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Crushed pineapple, in juice (well drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. In each of 4 parfait glasses or 12oz wine glasses, crumble 1 cookie.
2. Sprinkle each with 1 tablespoon Kahlua.
3. Top with 1/4 cup ice cream in each glass.
4. Spoon a layer of pineapple over the ice cream.
5. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon rum.
6. Repeat layers using remaining ingredients, ending with ice cream and sprinkling toasted coconut on top.
7. Serve immediately.
